name: Culp, Marguerite Porter
description: A real, true Kentonian—always ready to uphold the ideals and customs of the school.
text: A real, true Kentonian—always ready to uphold the ideals and customs of the school.

name: Welser, John C.
description: He disliked all the pomp and frivolity of life. Look at him now.
text: He disliked all the pomp and frivolity of life. Look at him now.

name: Damon, Ruth A.
description: A real woman. What could be better—first, last and always.
text: A real woman. What could be better—first, last and always.

name: Brintnall, Ruth
description: Ruth came to us only this year but she has added much to our life. We hope she has received full measure for what she has given.
text: Ruth came to us only this year but she has added much to our life. We hope she has received full measure for what she has given.

name: Fletcher, Mona
description: For of such is the spirit that leads us to do right. If you really wish to know something ask Mona Fletcher.
text: For of such is the spirit that leads us to do right. If you really wish to know something ask Mona Fletcher.

name: Rausch, Charles H.
description: If it wasn't for Rausch there would be no "Exchange" and what would we do without the "Exchange?"
text: If it wasn't for Rausch there would be no "Exchange" and what would we do without the "Exchange?"

name: Davis, Ross E.
description: His voice resounds like the voice of the gods. Let him but whisper and he is heard.
text: His voice resounds like the voice of the gods. Let him but whisper and he is heard.

name: Johnston, Leo X.
description: He chose the next highest calling to the ministry.
text: He chose the next highest calling to the ministry.

name: Moon, Ella F.
description: Always ready to help someone in need.
text: Always ready to help someone in need.

name: Moinet, Irene
major: Diploma Household Arts, Two Year Course
description: She can cook and sew and dance, what more could one want?
text: She can cook and sew and dance, what more could one want?

name: Westland, J. Elizabeth
motto: "Not for school, but for life we learn."
major: Diploma Household Arts, Two Year Course
text: "Not for school, but for life we learn."

name: O'Brien, Hildegarde
major: Diploma Household Arts, Two Year Course
description: She's the fairest of Ireland's fair daughters.
text: She's the fairest of Ireland's fair daughters.

name: Davison, M. Lucille
major: Diploma Household Arts, Two Year Course
description: In a seventh heaven of bliss with a needle, a pan, or a basketball.
text: In a seventh heaven of bliss with a needle, a pan, or a basketball.

name: Tanner, Martha
description: Seizing opportunities is a great accomplishment. Martha has succeeded well.
text: Seizing opportunities is a great accomplishment. Martha has succeeded well.

name: Wise, Naomi
description: Quiet, reserved and studious was she.
text: Quiet, reserved and studious was she.

name: Pim, Arwilda
motto: "I'm awfully, awfully hurried today."
text: "I'm awfully, awfully hurried today."

name: Jessie, Helrigel
description: Jessie was with us only a short time when she left. We never really knew the reason.
text: Jessie was with us only a short time when she left. We never really knew the reason.

name: Arthur, V. Clapp
description: Business now and forever.
text: Business now and forever.

name: Lydia, Atkinson
description: She counts her sheep three times a day to see how many have strayed away from the fold.
text: She counts her sheep three times a day to see how many have strayed away from the fold.

name: Herbert, Walter
description: A droll quick humor under his outer shell of sombreness.
text: A droll quick humor under his outer shell of sombreness.

name: Boyd, Kathleen
description: She has music even to her finger tips. She touches the keys and they speak.
text: She has music even to her finger tips. She touches the keys and they speak.

name: Yeo, Clarice
motto: "She'll be a teacher good and strict, but ne'er a kid will e'er get licked."
text: "She'll be a teacher good and strict, but ne'er a kid will e'er get licked."

name: Bean, Alice
description: She impresses one as a minister's daughter.
text: She impresses one as a minister's daughter.

name: Terrill, Lillian
description: She writes and writes and then she writes some more.
text: She writes and writes and then she writes some more.

name: Watson, Helen
major: Diploma Household Arts, Two Year Course
description: Service is her synonym.
text: Service is her synonym.

name: Pearl, H. Dutt
description: She comes from a family of Kentonians.
text: She comes from a family of Kentonians.

name: Ruth, Zepp
description: Preparedness is her motto.; Once again we see Ruth's face.
text: Preparedness is her motto.; Once again we see Ruth's face.

name: Margaret, H. Hawn
motto: "There was a maid who loved ice cream, She always said she did. We always thought there was another attraction underneath the lid."
text: "There was a maid who loved ice cream, She always said she did. We always thought there was another attraction underneath the lid."

name: Bessie, Nims
motto: "Still water runs deep."
text: "Still water runs deep."

name: Cook, Mildred
description: She likes one-sided romance.
text: She likes one-sided romance.

name: Breneman, Mary I.
description: Keep serene. A motto we could all afford to follow.
text: Keep serene. A motto we could all afford to follow.

name: Sommer, Beulah M.
description: Patience is an art. Therefore she is an artist.
text: Patience is an art. Therefore she is an artist.

name: Wattleworth, Esther
motto: "I have met my Waterloo."
text: "I have met my Waterloo."

name: Love, Mary
description: Women are not measured by inches.
text: Women are not measured by inches.

name: Terry, Zelda
motto: "We'll trust to the Lord to send movies today."
text: "We'll trust to the Lord to send movies today."

name: Wingerd, Harriet
motto: "Be good and you'll be happy, But you'll miss a lot of fun."
text: "Be good and you'll be happy, But you'll miss a lot of fun."

name: Moses, A. Kora
description: We were sorry to see him leave before the year was done.
text: We were sorry to see him leave before the year was done.

name: Wood, Doris E.
description: Warren has given us many delightful things, among them, Doris.
text: Warren has given us many delightful things, among them, Doris.

name: McDowell, Lester
description: "Oh! Mack is all right."
text: "Oh! Mack is all right."

name: Critz, Florence
description: Durability, strength and courage.
text: Durability, strength and courage.

name: Wegman, Lauramarie
motto: "Man works from sun to sun, Woman's work is never done."
description: Is there any civilization?
text:
"Man works from sun to sun, Woman's work is never done."
Is there any civilization?

name: Yeob, Burgett E.
motto: "The pen is mightier than the sword."
text: "The pen is mightier than the sword."

name: Reyburn, Freida
motto: "Come, come now! Naughty, naughty."
text: "Come, come now! Naughty, naughty."

name: Lyons, Ruth
description: We doubt if she will be long in this Line.
text: We doubt if she will be long in this Line.

name: Dorothy, Hemenway
description: She came a long distance to stay with us.
text: She came a long distance to stay with us.

name: Howard, E. Shepherd
motto: "The man who wished Paradise had never been lost."
text: "The man who wished Paradise had never been lost."

name: Charlotte, Jones
description: Quiet and demure but always a smile.
text: Quiet and demure but always a smile.

name: Fred, I. Shepherd
motto: "Variety is the spice of life."
text: "Variety is the spice of life."

name: Reusch, Herman
description: The best hero we have ever seen.
text: The best hero we have ever seen.

name: Talkington, Carris L.
motto: "I just thought it would happen like that."
description: Foresight
text:
"I just thought it would happen like that."
Foresight

name: Graham, Harold
motto: "I do my duty as I see it."
text: "I do my duty as I see it."

name: Carnahan, Louis
description: That nice cherub at Thompson's!
text: That nice cherub at Thompson's!

name: Laurance, Bentley
description: He's the fastest man on the team.
text: He's the fastest man on the team.

name: Boyd, Bridgewater
motto: "We just spin to Kent every morning."
text: "We just spin to Kent every morning."

name: Harold, Brown
description: Another one of the famous family.
text: Another one of the famous family.

name: Charles, Campbell
description: He never smiled until the play.
text: He never smiled until the play.

name: Ruth, Crocker
description: Lowry Hall's star performer on the field glasses.
text: Lowry Hall's star performer on the field glasses.

name: Robert, Gibson
description: Will he ever loan his motorcycle again?
text: Will he ever loan his motorcycle again?

name: Marion, Kettring
description: Ketty is a good sport.
text: Ketty is a good sport.

name: William, McAlpine
description: A soul endowed with oratory.
text: A soul endowed with oratory.

name: Esther, Walker
description: Marion Kettring's better half.
text: Marion Kettring's better half.

name: William, Whyte
description: Every inch a man. He's only a few over six feet.
text: Every inch a man. He's only a few over six feet.

name: Marshall, Lyda
motto: "None knew her but to love her, She's the finest we've ever had."
text: "None knew her but to love her, She's the finest we've ever had."

name: Phelan, Elizabeth
motto: "Oh, maiden, dear, Oh, maiden do, Oh, maiden, please tell us true The secret of those curls."
text: "Oh, maiden, dear, Oh, maiden do, Oh, maiden, please tell us true The secret of those curls."

name: Reed, Virgil
motto: "A friend to you, a friend to me."
text: "A friend to you, a friend to me."

name: Kalt, Agnes
motto: "Do your duty without regard for what people may say."
text: "Do your duty without regard for what people may say."

name: Morgan, Nellie Mae
motto: "Fire! Fire!!"
text: "Fire! Fire!!"

name: Jacobs, Edith
motto: "A relative of Mike's."
text: "A relative of Mike's."

name: Collins, Isabella
motto: "First she smiles, then she laughs, then she giggles."
text: "First she smiles, then she laughs, then she giggles."

name: McLennan, Hazel
motto: "Oh, I know but I really can't help it."
text: "Oh, I know but I really can't help it."

name: Marian, Jayne
description: We never knew an all around girl until we met Marian.
text: We never knew an all around girl until we met Marian.

name: Bigalow, Donna
motto: "Look forward not back."
description: And her smile tells us that she sees a pleasant vista ahead.
text:
"Look forward not back."
And her smile tells us that she sees a pleasant vista ahead.

name: Waters, Rena
description: She was a member of our Senior Class, but was taken from us last year.
text: She was a member of our Senior Class, but was taken from us last year.

name: Downing, Margaret
description: She works with a will.
text: She works with a will.

name: Robertson, Helen
motto: "Don't give up."
text: "Don't give up."

name: Randall, Lenore
description: She was the faithful guardian of Moulton Hall.
text: She was the faithful guardian of Moulton Hall.

name: Kucklick, Helen J.
motto: "Keep Smiling!"
text: "Keep Smiling!"

name: Conroy, Mary Ellen
motto: "Be sure you're right, then go ahead."
text: "Be sure you're right, then go ahead."

name: Brown, Ruth
motto: "What she'll do she will, you may depend on't. What she won't, she won't and there's an end on't."
text: "What she'll do she will, you may depend on't. What she won't, she won't and there's an end on't."

name: Drake, Lula
motto: "Live, laugh and love."
text: "Live, laugh and love."

name: Barth, Ignera
motto: "Simplicity is the keynote of elegance, Elegance is the stamp of a gentlewoman."
text: "Simplicity is the keynote of elegance, Elegance is the stamp of a gentlewoman."

name: Porter, Uritta
motto: "A good disposition is better than gold."
text: "A good disposition is better than gold."

name: Miller, Minnie Amanda
motto: "She abounds with pleasant faiths."
text: "She abounds with pleasant faiths."

name: Martin, Margaret
motto: "Where there's a will there's a way."
text: "Where there's a will there's a way."

name: Boyles, Frances
motto: "Her accuracy will be a sign of her honesty."
text: "Her accuracy will be a sign of her honesty."

name: Gwaltney, Maude
motto: "Quietness—where can you find its equal?"
text: "Quietness—where can you find its equal?"

name: Bareer, Mattie F.
description: She has a strong admiration for a good bluffer.
text: She has a strong admiration for a good bluffer.

name: Shannon, Nelle
motto: "Smile and the world smiles with you."
text: "Smile and the world smiles with you."

name: Webster, Madge
description: She'll work first, then rest.
text: She'll work first, then rest.

name: Maneely, Myrtie
motto: "Silence is the mother of truth."
text: "Silence is the mother of truth."

name: Clorine, Murray
motto: "You drown him by your talk."
text: "You drown him by your talk."

name: Katherine, Owens
motto: "She cares not a pin what they say or may say."
text: "She cares not a pin what they say or may say."

name: Gladys, Swineheart
motto: "Surety is her virtue."
text: "Surety is her virtue."

name: Gladys, Stackhouse
motto: "Surety is her virtue."
text: "Surety is her virtue."

name: Weinrich, Irma
motto: "I am very fond of my company of gentlemen."
text: "I am very fond of my company of gentlemen."

name: Points, Florence
motto: "It is her nature to blossom out in song."
text: "It is her nature to blossom out in song."

name: Wilson, Margaret
motto: "And she played opposite the best hero."
text: "And she played opposite the best hero."

name: Nye, Pauline
motto: "I would rather be, than seem to be."
text: "I would rather be, than seem to be."

name: Bethune, Belle
motto: "Don't be a quitter, that's good Scotch!"
text: "Don't be a quitter, that's good Scotch!"

name: Bowman, Maude
motto: "Her today's accomplishments make tomorrow's history."
text: "Her today's accomplishments make tomorrow's history."

name: Patterson, Laura
motto: "Eat, drink, be merry!"
text: "Eat, drink, be merry!"

name: Werntz, Myrtle
motto: "Willing to work."
text: "Willing to work."

name: Mcneil, Nadine
motto: "Every day you'll find her just as busy as can be."
text: "Every day you'll find her just as busy as can be."

name: Frye, Bessie
motto: "Her field of service will be the world."
text: "Her field of service will be the world."

name: Masey, Terra
motto: "Temperamental—well she is an artist!"
text: "Temperamental—well she is an artist!"

name: Atwater, Emma
motto: "A smile for everyone all of the time."
text: "A smile for everyone all of the time."

name: Miller, Laura
description: Some day there will be a sociology by Miller.
text: Some day there will be a sociology by Miller.

name: Minor, Maude
description: Her delight is to stroll in leafy lanes with James, Thorndyke and Angell.
text: Her delight is to stroll in leafy lanes with James, Thorndyke and Angell.

name: Meyers, Anna
description: When the rest fail, she rises nobly to the occasion.
text: When the rest fail, she rises nobly to the occasion.
